bounties.label: Claw for Human
bounties.audience: judges who want a human-ready product surface
bounties.hook: Bring Claw out of the shell and into a guided relationship workspace.
bounties.fit: SocialOS already turns OpenClaw-powered agent orchestration into a calm interface with memory, drafts, queue, and reflection.
bounties.uniqueAngle: Explainable relationship OS instead of a generic assistant shell.

proofs.title: OpenClaw runtime powers the product lanes
proofs.summary: 4 lanes active for orchestrator, memory, compliance, and publishing.

proofs.title: Judge-ready Workspace loop already exists
proofs.summary: Quick Capture, Contacts, Drafts, Queue, and Mirror already operate inside one loopback-only product surface.

proofs.title: Buddy mode keeps the experience safe and narrow
proofs.summary: The product stays loopback-only, dry-run by default, and Buddy mode funnels users into four friendly tasks.

proofs.title: Deck and public evidence stay submission-ready
proofs.summary: The shared pitch pack stays repo-native, with 4 runtime lanes and public evidence snapshots available for judges.

bounties.label: Animoca Bounty
bounties.audience: judges looking for identity, memory, and multi-agent coordination
bounties.hook: Position SocialOS as an identity-rich agent system for creator and community ops.
bounties.fit: The repo already has persistent people memory, linked identities, and explicit agent lanes for memory, compliance, and publishing.
bounties.uniqueAngle: Persistent identity and long-horizon memory instead of a one-shot agent demo.
demoSteps: Jump into Contacts and Studio agents

bounties.label: Human for Claw
bounties.audience: judges evaluating kid-friendly or family-friendly Claw experiences
bounties.hook: Offer a friendship and gratitude coach with guardrails instead of an unrestricted agent.
bounties.fit: SocialOS already captures people, follow-up, and reflection. Buddy mode narrows that loop to safe, supportive actions.
bounties.uniqueAngle: Positive social coaching with explicit boundaries and no risky publishing surface.
demoSteps: Jump into a prefilled Workspace flow

bounties.label: Z.AI General
bounties.audience: judges who want a real GLM-powered prototype
bounties.hook: Use GLM in the core multilingual SocialOS workflow, not as a side widget.
bounties.fit: Workspace responses, bilingual summarization, and draft generation all map naturally onto the current product loop.
bounties.uniqueAngle: Chinese + English creator workflow where GLM is a core path, not a decorative provider option.
demoSteps: Show GLM-tagged Workspace or Draft flow

bounties.label: AI Agents for Good
bounties.audience: judges looking for impact-focused agent workflows
bounties.hook: Turn SocialOS into a community support and volunteer coordination operating system.
bounties.fit: Contacts, events, follow-up drafts, and evidence-backed coordination already exist; FLock adds SDG triage and urgency scoring.
bounties.uniqueAngle: Long-term relationship memory and follow-through for impact work, not a one-turn charity chatbot.
demoSteps: Promote the result into follow-up actions and drafts
